<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused: one logical change per PR. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New scanner / detection
- [ ] Enhancement
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check isitsecure` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests (true-positive **and** true-negative where relevant)
- [ ] No app-specific route names / domains / product identifiers in generic logic
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or CLI flags changed
